name: SΔϕ-70 — Nihility, Helplessness, and Fictional Habitation: World-Binding Failure, Binding Fiction, and Exit Fiction
description: AI-readable working-paper package for SΔϕ-70. Defines nihility as World-Binding failure, helplessness as excessive World-Binding cost, and fiction as a fabricated habitation structure through which humans bind to, edit, or exit the world.
applicationCategory: AI routing, diagnostic schema, conceptual formalism
